scripts.prepare:stage: node scripts/stage-app.js && npm --prefix .app-stage install --omit=dev --no-package-lock && node scripts/finalize-stage.js
scripts.package:win:local: npm run prepare:stage && npx electron-packager .app-stage MyCodexTokens --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out release-packager --overwrite --electron-version 41.2.0 --icon=assets/icon.ico --prune=false
scripts.package: npm run prepare:stage && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 electron-builder -c.directories.app=.app-stage
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:stage && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 electron-builder --mac dmg zip -c.directories.app=.app-stage
scripts.package:win: npm run prepare:stage && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 electron-builder --win nsis portable -c.directories.app=.app-stage
